user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new recruiter strengths, so that recruiters can be matched to vacancies by their areas of strength
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Recruiter Strengths screen; When I click Add new recruiter strengths and enter the recruiter name, strengths and applicability; Then the entry is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view recruiter strengths with their applicability, so that I can review how recruiters are profiled
acceptance_criteria: Given recruiter strengths exist; When I open the list; Then each entry shows Recruiter name, Strengths and Applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the recruiter strengths list, so that I see the latest entries
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Recruiter Strengths screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
